svg.title: Alpha metrics failure count bar charts
svg.desc: Two bar charts showing number of failures over time for hard-knownfail and uber-plus-messy. Date labels use M/D HH:mm format from stored UTC timestamps.
svg.text: Two separate bar charts. Dates are formatted like 6/30 23:45 using the stored timestamp in 24-hour time.
Base point: 6/30 23:35. Latest point: 7/2 03:45. Y-axis is number of failing cases out of 150.
